HO-Azure :: attack-path-focused Azure recon
context :: tenant=auto subscription=auto output=table

[chains] Correlating grouped chain evidence with conservative cross-command joins.
ho-azure chains

╭────────┬─────────┬──────────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────╮
│priority│urgency  │starting foothold                 │path type                      │stronger outcome                    │
├────────┼─────────┼──────────────────────────────────┼───────────────────────────────┼────────────────────────────────────┤
│high    │pivot-now│azurefox-lab-sp (current foothold)│current-foothold direct control│Owner across subscription-wide scope│
╰────────┴─────────┴──────────────────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────╯
╭────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│note                                                                                        │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│The current foothold already has Owner across subscription-wide scope.                      │
│This row is already direct Azure control, not a separate pivot hunt.                        │
│HO-Azure is not narrowing one exact downstream action beyond the control already shown here.│
╰────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

╭────────┬───────────┬──────────────────────────────────┬───────────────┬─────────────────────────────╮
│priority│urgency    │starting foothold                 │path type      │stronger outcome             │
├────────┼───────────┼──────────────────────────────────┼───────────────┼─────────────────────────────┤
│medium  │review-soon│azurefox-lab-sp (current foothold)│trust expansion│Owner across 2 visible scopes│
╰────────┴───────────┴──────────────────────────────────┴───────────────┴─────────────────────────────╯
╭────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│note                                                                                                │
├────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│The current foothold can control application 'build-app', and that application already has federated│
│trust into service principal 'build-sp'.                                                            │
│That would add Owner-level Azure control, including role assignment on resource group 'rg-build-dr' │
│and resource group 'rg-identity'.                                                                   │
│HO-Azure is not proving that the current foothold already controls the visible federated subject or │
│has already changed that federated trust to make 'build-sp' usable.                                 │
│Remove the ownership path that lets the source control application 'build-app'.                     │
╰────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Claim boundary: Can claim that visible evidence suggests a current-foothold escalation story and can name what stronger control or trust consequence is in view. Cannot claim exploit success or multi-hop control without deeper evidence.
